/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:64:      "content": "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport { runScenario } from './benchmark.js'\nimport type {\n  BenchmarkScenario,\n  ClaudeComparisonResult,\n  ClaudePromptMode,\n  ClaudeUsageResult,\n} from './types.js'\n\nfunction buildPrompt(\n  task: string,\n  contextBlocks: string[],\n  mode: ClaudePromptMode,\n): string {\n  const blocks = contextBlocks.map((block, index) => {\n    return `Context Block ${index + 1}:\\n${block}`\n  })\n\n  const instructions =\n    mode === 'benchmark'\n      ? [\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\n        ]\n      : [\n          'Review the provided project context.',\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\n        ]\n\n  return [\n    ...instructions,\n    '',\n    `Task:\\n${task}`,\n    '',\n    ...blocks,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\n    result?: string\n    total_cost_usd?: number\n    modelUsage?: Record<\n      string,\n      {\n        inputTokens: number\n        outputTokens: number\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\n      }\n    >\n    usage?: {\n      input_tokens: number\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\n      output_tokens: number\n    }\n  }\n\n  const usage = parsed.usage\n  if (!usage) {\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\n  }\n\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\n\n  return {\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\n    model,\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\n    task,\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\n    mode,\n  )\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\n\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\n    if (options?.model) {\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\n    }\n\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\n      input: prompt,\n      encoding: 'utf8',\n    })\n\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\n    }\n\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\n  }\n\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\n\n  const baselineTotal =\n    baseline.inputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    baseline.outputTokens\n  const optimizedTotal =\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\n\n  return {\n    baseline,\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\n    ...options,\n    mode: 'review',\n  })\n}\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:74:      "content": "import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'\nimport { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport type { BenchmarkScenario, ContextCandidate, ContextCandidatePriority } from './types.js'\nimport { estimateTokens } from './input.js'\n\nexport type ImportOptions = {\n  title: string\n  objective: string\n  outFile: string\n  softLimitTokens: number\n  hardLimitTokens: number\n  readPaths: string[]\n  logPaths: string[]\n  searchPatterns: string[]\n  searchRoot: string\n}\n\nfunction createCandidate(args: {\n  id: string\n  kind: ContextCandidate['kind']\n  priority: ContextCandidatePriority\n  content: string\n  source: string\n}): ContextCandidate {\n  return {\n    id: args.id,\n    kind: args.kind,\n    priority: args.priority,\n    content: args.content,\n    tokenEstimate: estimateTokens(args.content),\n    metadata: { source: args.source },\n  }\n}\n\nfunction readSearchResults(pattern: string, searchRoot: string): string {\n  const result = spawnSync(\n    'rg',\n    ['-n', '--no-heading', pattern, searchRoot],\n    { encoding: 'utf8' },\n  )\n\n  if (result.status !== 0 && result.status !== 1) {\n    throw new Error(result.stderr || `rg failed for pattern: ${pattern}`)\n  }\n\n  return result.stdout.trim()\n}\n\nexport function buildImportedScenario(options: ImportOptions): BenchmarkScenario {\n  const candidates: ContextCandidate[] = [\n    {\n      id: 'objective',\n      kind: 'other',\n      priority: 'critical',\n      content: options.objective,\n      tokenEstimate: estimateTokens(options.objective),\n      metadata: { source: 'objective' },\n    },\n  ]\n\n  for (const filePath of options.readPaths) {\n    const absolutePath = resolve(filePath)\n    const content = readFileSync(absolutePath, 'utf8')\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `read-${basename(filePath).replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'file_read',\n        priority: 'high',\n        content,\n        source: filePath,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  for (const filePath of options.logPaths) {\n    const absolutePath = resolve(filePath)\n    const content = readFileSync(absolutePath, 'utf8')\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `log-${basename(filePath).replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'shell_output',\n        priority: 'medium',\n        content,\n        source: filePath,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  for (const pattern of options.searchPatterns) {\n    const content = readSearchResults(pattern, options.searchRoot)\n    if (!content) continue\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `search-${pattern.replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'search_result',\n        priority: 'medium',\n        content,\n        source: `rg ${pattern}`,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  return {\n    id: options.title.toLowerCase().replace(/\\W+/g, '-'),\n    title: options.title,\n    description: `Imported scenario for ${options.title}`,\n    budget: {\n      softLimitTokens: options.softLimitTokens,\n      hardLimitTokens: options.hardLimitTokens,\n    },\n    candidates,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function writeImportedScenario(options: ImportOptions): BenchmarkScenario {\n  const scenario = buildImportedScenario(options)\n  writeFileSync(options.outFile, `${JSON.stringify(scenario, null, 2)}\\n`, 'utf8')\n  return scenario\n}\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:84:      "content": "# Architecture\n\n## Overview\n\nAgent Context Governor should be a runtime library, not just a reporting package.\n\nIt should integrate at the point where an agent runtime is about to assemble and send model context.\n\n## Core Flow\n\n1. Gather candidate context.\n2. Estimate token pressure.\n3. Classify context by type and value.\n4. Apply optimization policies.\n5. Emit final context payload.\n6. Record savings metrics.\n\n## Core Modules\n\n### `ContextArtifactStore`\n\nStores bulky artifacts separately from the prompt payload.\n\nExamples:\n\n- file read outputs\n- grep outputs\n- shell logs\n- diagnostics\n- web content\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- persist artifacts by ID\n- expose compact metadata\n- expose summary payloads\n- allow expansion when the runtime explicitly needs the full artifact again\n\n### `ContextGovernor`\n\nMain orchestration layer.\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- accept raw context candidates\n- run estimation\n- call ranking and replacement policies\n- produce the optimized context payload\n- emit debug and metrics events\n\n### `ContextBudgetPolicy`\n\nDefines how much context may be sent for a turn or subagent.\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- enforce hard and soft token budgets\n- handle per-agent overrides\n- choose which classes of context degrade first\n\n### `ContextRanker`\n\nRanks context by likely task value.\n\nLikely high-value inputs:\n\n- active task objective\n- recent file edits\n- current errors\n- latest tool calls\n- task-specific memory\n\nLikely lower-value inputs:\n\n- old search output\n- repeated file reads\n- long shell logs already resolved\n- stale chat history\n\n### `SurrogateBuilder`\n\nBuilds compact replacements for bulky artifacts.\n\nExamples:\n\n- \"Read `src/foo.ts` previously; key exports: X, Y, Z\"\n- \"Search result set stored as artifact `grep_17`; 32 matches across 5 files\"\n- \"Shell output summarized: build failed in a test file due to a missing configuration value\"\n\n### `SavingsReporter`\n\nMeasures optimization effect.\n\nMetrics:\n\n- projected baseline tokens\n- actual tokens sent\n- saved tokens\n- savings percentage\n- latency overhead\n\n## Data Model\n\nInitial conceptual types:\n\n- `ContextArtifact`\n- `ContextCandidate`\n- `ContextSummary`\n- `OptimizationDecision`\n- `BudgetResult`\n- `SavingsReport`\n\n## Integration Points\n\nThe most valuable runtime hooks are:\n\n1. before a main agent request is sent\n2. before a subagent request is forked\n3. when a tool result is ingested\n4. when older transcript regions become stale\n\n## MVP Architecture\n\nThe first version should stay simple:\n\n- artifact storage in local files or memory\n- heuristic ranking, not ML ranking\n- explicit replacement rules for known bulky artifact types\n- one runtime integration first\n\n## Safety Rules\n\n- never drop the current task objective\n- never drop recent write/edit intent\n- never compact unresolved error state out of existence\n- keep a trace of every optimization decision\n- support debug mode to inspect before/after context\n\n## Benchmark Harness\n\nThe architecture should include a repeatable benchmark mode.\n\nThe benchmark should compare:\n\n- baseline runtime behavior\n- optimized runtime behavior\n\nAcross each run, record:\n\n- token usage\n- latency\n- tool count\n- final task outcome quality\n",

Architecture\\n\\n## Overview\\n\\nAgent Context Governor should be a runtime library, not just a reporting package.\\n\\nIt should integrate at the point where an agent runtime is about to assemble and send model context.\\n\\n## Core Flow\\n\\n1. Gather candidate context.\\n2. Estimate token pressure.\\n3. Classify context by type and value.\\n4. Apply optimization policies.\\n5. Emit final context payload.\\n6. Record savings metrics.\\n\\n## Core Modules\\n\\n### `ContextArtifactStore`\\n\\nStores bulky artifacts separately from the prompt payload.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- file read outputs\\n- grep outputs\\n- shell logs\\n- diagnostics\\n- web content\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- persist artifacts by ID\\n- expose compact metadata\\n- expose summary payloads\\n- allow expansion when the runtime explicitly needs the full artifact again\\n\\n### `ContextGovernor`\\n\\nMain orchestration layer.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- accept raw context candidates\\n- run estimation\\n- call ranking and replacement policies\\n- produce the optimized context payload\\n- emit debug and metrics events\\n\\n### `ContextBudgetPolicy`\\n\\nDefines how much context may be sent for a turn or subagent.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- enforce hard and soft token budgets\\n- handle per-agent overrides\\n- choose which classes of context degrade first\\n\\n### `ContextRanker`\\n\\nRanks context by likely task value.\\n\\nLikely high-value inputs:\\n\\n- active task objective\\n- recent file edits\\n- current errors\\n- latest tool calls\\n- task-specific memory\\n\\nLikely lower-value inputs:\\n\\n- old search output\\n- repeated file reads\\n- long shell logs already resolved\\n- stale chat history\\n\\n### `SurrogateBuilder`\\n\\nBuilds compact replacements for bulky artifacts.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- \\\"Read `src/foo.ts` previously; key exports: X, Y, Z\\\"\\n- \\\"Search result set stored as artifact `grep_17`; 32 matches across 5 files\\\"\\n- \\\"Shell output summarized: build failed in a test file due to a missing configuration value\\\"\\n\\n### `SavingsReporter`\\n\\nMeasures optimization effect.\\n\\nMetrics:\\n\\n- projected baseline tokens\\n- actual tokens sent\\n- saved tokens\\n- savings percentage\\n- latency overhead\\n\\n## Data Model\\n\\nInitial conceptual types:\\n\\n- `ContextArtifact`\\n- `ContextCandidate`\\n- `ContextSummary`\\n- `OptimizationDecision`\\n- `BudgetResult`\\n- `SavingsReport`\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\nThe most valuable runtime hooks are:\\n\\n1. before a main agent request is sent\\n2. before a subagent request is forked\\n3. when a tool result is ingested\\n4. when older transcript regions become stale\\n\\n## MVP Architecture\\n\\nThe first version should stay simple:\\n\\n- artifact storage in local files or memory\\n- heuristic ranking, not ML ranking\\n- explicit replacement rules for known bulky artifact types\\n- one runtime integration first\\n\\n## Safety Rules\\n\\n- never drop the current task objective\\n- never drop recent write/edit intent\\n- never compact unresolved error state out of existence\\n- keep a trace of every optimization decision\\n- support debug mode to inspect before/after context\\n\\n## Benchmark Harness\\n\\nThe architecture should include a repeatable benchmark mode.\\n\\nThe benchmark should compare:\\n\\n- baseline runtime behavior\\n- optimized runtime behavior\\n\\nAcross each run, record:\\n\\n- token usage\\n- latency\\n- tool count\\n- final task outcome quality\\n\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:85:      \"tokenEstimate\": 792,\n./examples/repo-review.json:95:      \"tokenEstimate\": 378,\n./examples/repo-review.json:101:      \"id\": \"search-token\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:104:      \"content\": \"./docs/architecture.md:12:2. [\\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\\n        ]\\n      : [\\n          'Review the provided project context.',\\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\\n        ]\\n\\n  return [\\n    ...instructions,\\n    '',\\n    `Task:\\\\n${task}`,\\n    '',\\n    ...blocks,\\n  ].join('\\\\n')\\n}\\n\\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\\n    result?: string\\n    total_cost_usd?: number\\n    modelUsage?: Record<\\n      string,\\n      {\\n        inputTokens: number\\n        outputTokens: number\\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\\n      }\\n    >\\n    usage?: {\\n      input_tokens: number\\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\\n      output_tokens: number\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  const usage = parsed.usage\\n  if (!usage) {\\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\\n  }\\n\\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\\n\\n  return {\\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\\n    model,\\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\\n  options?: {\\n    claudeBin?: string\\n    model?: string\\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\\n  },\\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\\n    task,\\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\\n    mode,\\n  )\\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\\n\\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\\n    if (options?.model) {\\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\\n    }\\n\\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\\n      input: prompt,\\n      encoding: 'utf8',\\n    })\\n\\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\\n    }\\n\\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\\n  }\\n\\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\\n\\n  const baselineTotal =\\n    baseline.inputTokens +\\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\\n    baseline.outputTokens\\n  const optimizedTotal =\\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\\n\\n  return {\\n    baseline,\\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\\n  options?: {\\n    claudeBin?: string\\n    model?: string\\n  },\\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\\n    ...options,\\n    mode: 'review',\\n  })\\n}\\n\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:67:        \"source\": \"src/claude.ts\"\n./examples/repo-review.json:104:      \"content\": \"./docs/architecture.md:12:2. /home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:24:      "content": "# Agent Context Governor\n\nOpen-source project to reduce token usage in coding-agent workflows by shaping context before requests are sent.\n\n## Status\n\nEarly design and prototype stage.\n\n## What This Project Does\n\nAgent Context Governor is an embedded optimization layer for agent-mode runtimes.\n\nCurrent goals:\n\n- estimate next-turn context cost\n- rank context by operational value\n- replace bulky low-value artifacts with compact surrogates\n- enforce per-agent budgets\n- measure projected vs actual token usage\n\n## Documents\n\n- [Vision](./docs/vision.md)\n- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.md)\n- [Roadmap](./docs/roadmap.md)\n- [Benchmarks](./docs/benchmarks.md)\n- [Glossary](./docs/glossary.md)\n\n## Getting Started\n\n```bash\nnpm install\nnpm run check\nnpm run lint\nnpm run build\nnpm test\nnpm run bench\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpm run compare:claude\n```\n\nYou can run the CLI from the repository after build with:\n\n```bash\nnpx acg help\nnpx acg list\nnpx acg bench\nnpx acg scenario subagent-debug\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpx acg compare-claude ./examples/sample-session.json\n```\n\n## Repository Basics\n\n- [License](./LICENSE)\n- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md)\n\n## Configuration\n\nThe prototype now includes a small config layer for:\n\n- budget limits\n- replacement-enabled artifact kinds\n- replacement token costs\n- candidate priority scores\n\nThe default config lives in [config.ts](./src/config.ts).\n",

runScenario } from './benchmark.js'\nimport { runClaudeBenchmark, runClaudeReviewComparison } from './claude.js'\nimport { getDefaultScenarios } from './fixtures.js'\nimport { writeImportedScenario } from './importer.js'\nimport { parseScenarioFile } from './input.js'\n\nfunction formatPercent(value: number): string {\n  return `${(value * 100).toFixed(1)}%`\n}\n\nfunction formatScenarioList(): string {\n  return getDefaultScenarios()\n    .map(scenario => `- ${scenario.id}: ${scenario.title}`)\n    .join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatBenchmarkOutput(): string {\n  const results = runBenchmarks(getDefaultScenarios())\n\n  return results\n    .map(result => {\n      const lines = [\n        `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n        `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n        `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n        `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n        'Decisions:',\n        ...result.decisions.map(\n          decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n        ),\n      ]\n\n      return lines.join('\\n')\n    })\n    .join('\\n\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatSingleScenario(id: string): string {\n  const scenario = getDefaultScenarios().find(item => item.id === id)\n  if (!scenario) {\n    return [\n      `Unknown scenario: ${id}`,\n      'Available scenarios:',\n      formatScenarioList(),\n    ].join('\\n')\n  }\n\n  const result = runScenario(scenario)\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n    `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n    `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n    `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n    'Final context:',\n    ...result.finalContext.map(line => `- ${line}`),\n    'Decisions:',\n    ...result.decisions.map(\n      decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n    ),\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatScenarioResult(result: ReturnType<typeof runScenario>): string {\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n    `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n    `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n    `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n    'Final context:',\n    ...result.finalContext.map(line => `- ${line}`),\n    'Decisions:',\n    ...result.decisions.map(\n      decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n    ),\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatFileScenario(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runScenario(scenario)\n  return formatScenarioResult(result)\n}\n\nfunction formatClaudeComparison(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runClaudeBenchmark(scenario)\n\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Claude baseline input tokens: ${result.baseline.inputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized input tokens: ${result.optimized.inputTokens}`,\n    `Saved input tokens: ${result.savedInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude baseline cache creation tokens: ${result.baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized cache creation tokens: ${result.optimized.cacheCreationInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache creation tokens: ${result.savedCacheCreationTokens}`,\n    `Claude baseline cache read tokens: ${result.baseline.cacheReadInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized cache read tokens: ${result.optimized.cacheReadInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache read tokens: ${result.savedCacheReadTokens}`,\n 'unknown'}`,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatClaudeReviewComparison(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runClaudeReviewComparison(scenario)\n\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Saved input tokens: ${result.savedInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache creation tokens: ${result.savedCacheCreationTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache read tokens: ${result.savedCacheReadTokens}`,\n    `Saved total tokens: ${result.savedTotalTokens}`,\n    '',\n    'Baseline review:',\n    result.baseline.rawResult || '(empty)',\n    '',\n    'Optimized review:',\n    result.optimized.rawResult || '(empty)',\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction getFlagValues(argv: string[], flag: string): string[] {\n  const values: string[] = []\n  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i++) {\n    if (argv[i] === flag) {\n      const value = argv[i + 1]\n      if (value && !value.startsWith('--')) {\n        values.push(value)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return values\n}\n\nfunction getFlagValue(argv: string[], flag: string): string | undefined {\n  return getFlagValues(argv, flag)[0]\n}\n\nfunction formatImportedScenario(argv: string[]): string {\n  const objective = getFlagValue(argv, '--objective')\n  if (!objective) {\n    throw new Error('Missing required flag: --objective')\n  }\n\n  const title = getFlagValue(argv, '--title') ?? 'Imported Scenario'\n  const outFile = getFlagValue(argv, '--out') ?? './acg-session.json'\n  const searchRoot = getFlagValue(argv, '--search-root') ?? '.'\n  const softLimitTokens = Number(getFlagValue(argv, '--soft-limit') ?? '4000')\n  const hardLimitTokens = Number(getFlagValue(argv, '--hard-limit') ?? '6000')\n  const readPaths = getFlagValues(argv, '--read')\n  const logPaths = getFlagValues(argv, '--log')\n  const searchPatterns = getFlagValues(argv, '--search')\n\n  const scenario = writeImportedScenario({\n    title,\n    objective,\n    outFile,\n    softLimitTokens,\n    hardLimitTokens,\n    readPaths,\n    logPaths,\n    searchPatterns,\n    searchRoot,\n  })\n\n  return [\n    `Wrote scenario: ${outFile}`,\n    `Title: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Candidates: ${scenario.candidates.length}`,\n    `Budget: soft=${scenario.budget.softLimitTokens} hard=${scenario.budget.hardLimitTokens}`,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction printHelp(): string {\n  return [\n    'Agent Context Governor CLI',\n    '',\n    'Usage:',\n    '  acg help',\n    '  acg list',\n    '  acg demo',\n    '  acg bench',\n    '  acg scenario <id>',\n    '  acg run <scenario.json>',\n    '  acg compare-claude <scenario.json>',\n    '  acg import --objective <text> Run the default demo output',\n    '  bench      Run all built-in benchmark scenarios',\n    '  scenario   Run one built-in scenario by id',\n    '  run        Run a custom scenario from a JSON case 'review-claude':\n      if (!arg) {\n        console.log('Missing scenario file path.\\n')\n        console.log('Example: acg review-claude ./examples/sample-session.json')\n        return\n      }\n      console.log(formatClaudeReviewComparison(arg))\n      return\n    case 'import':\n      console.log(formatImportedScenario(argv.slice(2)))\n      return\n    default:\n DEFAULT_GOVERNOR_CONFIG, mergeGovernorConfig, type GovernorConfig } from './config.js'\nimport {\n  compareCandidates,\n  evaluateCandidate,\n  toDecision,\n} from './rules.js'\nimport { SavingsReporter } from './savings-reporter.js'\nimport type {\n  GovernorInput,\n  GovernorResult,\n  OptimizationDecision,\n} from './types.js'\n\nexport class ContextGovernor {\n  constructor(private readonly config: GovernorConfig = DEFAULT_GOVERNOR_CONFIG) {}\n\n  optimize(input: GovernorInput): GovernorResult {\n    const effectiveConfig = mergeGovernorConfig({\n      ...this.config,\n      budget: input.budget,\n    })\n    const policy = new ContextBudgetPolicy(effectiveConfig.budget)\n    const reporter = new SavingsReporter()\n    const baselineTokens = policy.sumTokens(input.candidates)\n    const decisions: OptimizationDecision[] = []\n\n    const ordered = [...input.candidates].sort((left, right) =>\n      compareCandidates(left, right, effectiveConfig),\n    )\n\n    let runningTokens = 0\n    const finalContext: string[] = []\n\n    for (const candidate of ordered) {\n      const action = evaluateCandidate(candidate, {\n        softLimitTokens: effectiveConfig.budget.softLimitTokens,\n        hardLimitTokens: effectiveConfig.budget.hardLimitTokens,\n        runningTokens,\n        config: effectiveConfig,\n      })\n\n      if (action.type === 'keep') {\n        finalContext.push(candidate.content)\n        runningTokens += action.tokenCost\n        decisions.push(toDecision(candidate.id, action))\n        continue\n      }\n\n      if (action.type === 'replace') {\n        finalContext.push(action.replacement)\n        runningTokens += action.tokenCost\n        decisions.push(toDecision(candidate.id, action))\n        continue\n      }\n\n      decisions.push(toDecision(candidate.id, action))\n    }\n\n    const report = reporter.createReport(baselineTokens, runningTokens)\n\n    return {\n      finalContext,\n      decisions,\n      baselineTokens: report.baselineTokens,\n      optimizedTokens: report.optimizedTokens,\n    }\n  }\n}\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:64:      "content": "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport { runScenario } from './benchmark.js'\nimport type {\n  BenchmarkScenario,\n  ClaudeComparisonResult,\n  ClaudePromptMode,\n  ClaudeUsageResult,\n} from './types.js'\n\nfunction buildPrompt(\n  task: string,\n  contextBlocks: string[],\n  mode: ClaudePromptMode,\n): string {\n  const blocks = contextBlocks.map((block, index) => {\n    return `Context Block ${index + 1}:\\n${block}`\n  })\n\n  const instructions =\n    mode === 'benchmark'\n      ? [\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\n        ]\n      : [\n          'Review the provided project context.',\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\n        ]\n\n  return [\n    ...instructions,\n    '',\n    `Task:\\n${task}`,\n    '',\n    ...blocks,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\n    result?: string\n    total_cost_usd?: number\n    modelUsage?: Record<\n      string,\n      {\n        inputTokens: number\n        outputTokens: number\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\n      }\n    >\n    usage?: {\n      input_tokens: number\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\n      output_tokens: number\n    }\n  }\n\n  const usage = parsed.usage\n  if (!usage) {\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\n  }\n\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\n\n  return {\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\n    model,\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\n    task,\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\n    mode,\n  )\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\n\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\n    if (options?.model) {\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\n    }\n\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\n      input: prompt,\n      encoding: 'utf8',\n    })\n\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\n    }\n\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\n  }\n\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\n\n  const baselineTotal =\n    baseline.inputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    baseline.outputTokens\n  const optimizedTotal =\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\n\n  return {\n    baseline,\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\n    ...options,\n    mode: 'review',\n  })\n}\n",

'node:path'\nimport { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport type { BenchmarkScenario, ContextCandidate, ContextCandidatePriority } from './types.js'\nimport { estimateTokens } from './input.js'\n\nexport type ImportOptions = {\n  title: string\n  objective: string\n  outFile: string\n  softLimitTokens: number\n  hardLimitTokens: number\n  readPaths: string[]\n  logPaths: string[]\n  searchPatterns: string[]\n  searchRoot: string\n}\n\nfunction createCandidate(args: {\n  id: string\n  kind: ContextCandidate['kind']\n  priority: ContextCandidatePriority\n  content: string\n  source: string\n}): ContextCandidate {\n  return {\n    id: args.id,\n    kind: args.kind,\n    priority: args.priority,\n    content: args.content,\n    tokenEstimate: estimateTokens(args.content),\n    metadata: { source: args.source },\n  }\n}\n\nfunction readSearchResults(pattern: string, searchRoot: string): string {\n  const result = spawnSync(\n    'rg',\n    ['-n', '--no-heading', pattern, searchRoot],\n    { encoding: 'utf8' },\n  )\n\n  if (result.status !== 0 && result.status !== 1) {\n    throw new Error(result.stderr || `rg failed for pattern: ${pattern}`)\n  }\n\n  return result.stdout.trim()\n}\n\nexport function buildImportedScenario(options: ImportOptions): BenchmarkScenario {\n  const candidates: ContextCandidate[] = [\n    {\n      id: 'objective',\n      kind: 'other',\n      priority: 'critical',\n      content: options.objective,\n      tokenEstimate: estimateTokens(options.objective),\n      metadata: { source: 'objective' },\n    },\n  ]\n\n  for (const filePath of options.readPaths) {\n    const absolutePath = resolve(filePath)\n    const content = readFileSync(absolutePath, 'utf8')\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `read-${basename(filePath).replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'file_read',\n        priority: 'high',\n        content,\n        source: filePath,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  for (const filePath of options.logPaths) {\n    const absolutePath = resolve(filePath)\n    const content = readFileSync(absolutePath, 'utf8')\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `log-${basename(filePath).replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'shell_output',\n        priority: 'medium',\n        content,\n        source: filePath,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  for (const pattern of options.searchPatterns) {\n    const content = readSearchResults(pattern, options.searchRoot)\n    if (!content) continue\n    candidates.push(\n      createCandidate({\n        id: `search-${pattern.replace(/\\W+/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`,\n        kind: 'search_result',\n        priority: 'medium',\n        content,\n        source: `rg ${pattern}`,\n      }),\n    )\n  }\n\n  return {\n    id: options.title.toLowerCase().replace(/\\W+/g, '-'),\n    title: options.title,\n    description: `Imported scenario for ${options.title}`,\n    budget: {\n      softLimitTokens: options.softLimitTokens,\n      hardLimitTokens: options.hardLimitTokens,\n    },\n    candidates,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function writeImportedScenario(options: ImportOptions): BenchmarkScenario {\n  const scenario = buildImportedScenario(options)\n  writeFileSync(options.outFile, `${JSON.stringify(scenario, null, 2)}\\n`, 'utf8')\n  return scenario\n}\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:84:      "content": "# Architecture\n\n## Overview\n\nAgent Context Governor should be a runtime library, not just a reporting package.\n\nIt should integrate at the point where an agent runtime is about to assemble and send model context.\n\n## Core Flow\n\n1. Gather candidate context.\n2. Estimate token pressure.\n3. Classify context by type and value.\n4. Apply optimization policies.\n5. Emit final context payload.\n6. Record savings metrics.\n\n## Core Modules\n\n### `ContextArtifactStore`\n\nStores bulky artifacts separately from the prompt payload.\n\nExamples:\n\n- file read outputs\n- grep outputs\n- shell logs\n- diagnostics\n- web content\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- persist artifacts by ID\n- expose compact metadata\n- expose summary payloads\n- allow expansion when the runtime explicitly needs the full artifact again\n\n### `ContextGovernor`\n\nMain orchestration layer.\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- accept raw context candidates\n- run estimation\n- call ranking and replacement policies\n- produce the optimized context payload\n- emit debug and metrics events\n\n### `ContextBudgetPolicy`\n\nDefines how much context may be sent for a turn or subagent.\n\nResponsibilities:\n\n- enforce hard and soft token budgets\n- handle per-agent overrides\n- choose which classes of context degrade first\n\n### `ContextRanker`\n\nRanks context by likely task value.\n\nLikely high-value inputs:\n\n- active task objective\n- recent file edits\n- current errors\n- latest tool calls\n- task-specific memory\n\nLikely lower-value inputs:\n\n- old search output\n- repeated file reads\n- long shell logs already resolved\n- stale chat history\n\n### `SurrogateBuilder`\n\nBuilds compact replacements for bulky artifacts.\n\nExamples:\n\n- \"Read `src/foo.ts` previously; key exports: X, Y, Z\"\n- \"Search result set stored as artifact `grep_17`; 32 matches across 5 files\"\n- \"Shell output summarized: build failed in a test file due to a missing configuration value\"\n\n### `SavingsReporter`\n\nMeasures optimization effect.\n\nMetrics:\n\n- projected baseline tokens\n- actual tokens sent\n- saved tokens\n- savings percentage\n- latency overhead\n\n## Data Model\n\nInitial conceptual types:\n\n- `ContextArtifact`\n- `ContextCandidate`\n- `ContextSummary`\n- `OptimizationDecision`\n- `BudgetResult`\n- `SavingsReport`\n\n## Integration Points\n\nThe most valuable runtime hooks are:\n\n1. before a main agent request is sent\n2. before a subagent request is forked\n3. when a tool result is ingested\n4. when older transcript regions become stale\n\n## MVP Architecture\n\nThe first version should stay simple:\n\n- artifact storage in local files or memory\n- heuristic ranking, not ML ranking\n- explicit replacement rules for known bulky artifact types\n- one runtime integration first\n\n## Safety Rules\n\n- never drop the current task objective\n- never drop recent write/edit intent\n- never compact unresolved error state out of existence\n- keep a trace of every optimization decision\n- support debug mode to inspect before/after context\n\n## Benchmark Harness\n\nThe architecture should include a repeatable benchmark mode.\n\nThe benchmark should compare:\n\n- baseline runtime behavior\n- optimized runtime behavior\n\nAcross each run, record:\n\n- token usage\n- latency\n- tool count\n- final task outcome quality\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:24:      "content": "# Agent Context Governor\n\nOpen-source project to reduce token usage in coding-agent workflows by shaping context before requests are sent.\n\n## Status\n\nEarly design and prototype stage.\n\n## What This Project Does\n\nAgent Context Governor is an embedded optimization layer for agent-mode runtimes.\n\nCurrent goals:\n\n- estimate next-turn context cost\n- rank context by operational value\n- replace bulky low-value artifacts with compact surrogates\n- enforce per-agent budgets\n- measure projected vs actual token usage\n\n## Documents\n\n- [Vision](./docs/vision.md)\n- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.md)\n- [Roadmap](./docs/roadmap.md)\n- [Benchmarks](./docs/benchmarks.md)\n- [Glossary](./docs/glossary.md)\n\n## Getting Started\n\n```bash\nnpm install\nnpm run check\nnpm run lint\nnpm run build\nnpm test\nnpm run bench\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpm run compare:claude\n```\n\nYou can run the CLI from the repository after build with:\n\n```bash\nnpx acg help\nnpx acg list\nnpx acg bench\nnpx acg scenario subagent-debug\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpx acg compare-claude ./examples/sample-session.json\n```\n\n## Repository Basics\n\n- [License](./LICENSE)\n- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md)\n\n## Configuration\n\nThe prototype now includes a small config layer for:\n\n- budget limits\n- replacement-enabled artifact kinds\n- replacement token costs\n- candidate priority scores\n\nThe default config lives in [config.ts](./src/config.ts).\n",
/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:34:      "content": "{\n  \"name\": \"agent-context-governor\",\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n  \"description\": \"Open-source runtime library for reducing token usage in coding-agent workflows.\",\n  \"type\": \"module\",\n  \"main\": \"./dist/src/index.js\",\n  \"types\": \"./dist/src/index.d.ts\",\n  \"exports\": {\n    \".\": {\n      \"types\": \"./dist/src/index.d.ts\",\n      \"import\": \"./dist/src/index.js\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"bin\": {\n    \"acg\": \"./dist/src/cli.js\"\n  },\n  \"files\": [\n    \"dist\"\n  ],\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"build\": \"tsc -p tsconfig.json\",\n    \"check\": \"tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json\",\n    \"lint\": \"eslint .\",\n    \"demo\": \"node ./dist/src/cli.js demo\",\n    \"bench\": \"node ./dist/src/cli.js bench\",\n    \"compare:claude\": \"node ./dist/src/cli.js compare-claude ./examples/sample-session.json\",\n    \"test\": \"node --test dist/test\"\n  },\n  \"keywords\": [\n    \"agents\",\n    \"llm\",\n    \"tokens\",\n    \"context\",\n    \"optimization\"\n  ],\n  \"author\": \"Glauco Jr Carvalho\",\n  \"repository\": {\n    \"type\": \"git\",\n    \"url\": \"git+ssh://git@github.com/glaucojrcarvalho/agent-context-governor.git\"\n  },\n  \"bugs\": {\n    \"url\": \"https://github.com/glaucojrcarvalho/agent-context-governor/issues\"\n  },\n  \"homepage\": \"https://github.com/glaucojrcarvalho/agent-context-governor#readme\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"node\": \">=20\"\n  },\n  \"license\": \"MIT\",\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@eslint/js\": \"^9.25.1\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^20.17.30\",\n    \"eslint\": \"^9.25.1\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.8.3\"\n  }\n}\n",
/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:44:      "content": "#!/usr/bin/env node\n\nimport { resolve } from 'node:path'\n\nimport { runBenchmarks, from './importer.js'\nimport { parseScenarioFile } from './input.js'\nimport { writeClaudeReviewReport } from './report.js'\n\nfunction formatPercent(value: number): string {\n  return `${(value * /home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review-v2.json:64:      "content": "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport { runScenario } from './benchmark.js'\nimport type {\n  BenchmarkScenario,\n  ClaudeComparisonResult,\n  ClaudePromptMode,\n  ClaudeUsageResult,\n} from './types.js'\n\nfunction buildPrompt(\n  task: string,\n  contextBlocks: string[],\n  mode: ClaudePromptMode,\n): string {\n  const blocks = contextBlocks.map((block, index) => {\n    return `Context Block ${index + 1}:\\n${block}`\n  })\n\n  const instructions =\n    mode === 'benchmark'\n      ? [\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\n        ]\n      : [\n          'Review the provided project context.',\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\n        ]\n\n  return [\n    ...instructions,\n    '',\n    `Task:\\n${task}`,\n    '',\n    ...blocks,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\n    result?: string\n    total_cost_usd?: number\n    modelUsage?: Record<\n      string,\n      {\n        inputTokens: number\n        outputTokens: number\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\n      }\n    >\n    usage?: {\n      input_tokens: number\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\n      output_tokens: number\n    }\n  }\n\n  const usage = parsed.usage\n  if (!usage) {\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\n  }\n\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\n\n  return {\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\n    model,\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\n    task,\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\n    mode,\n  )\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\n\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\n    if (options?.model) {\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\n    }\n\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\n      input: prompt,\n      encoding: 'utf8',\n    })\n\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\n    }\n\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\n  }\n\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\n\n  const baselineTotal =\n    baseline.inputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    baseline.outputTokens\n  const optimizedTotal =\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\n\n  return {\n    baseline,\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\n    ...options,\n    mode: 'review',\n  })\n}\n",

Architecture\\n\\n## Overview\\n\\nAgent Context Governor should be a runtime library, not just a reporting package.\\n\\nIt should integrate at the point where an agent runtime is about to assemble and send model context.\\n\\n## Core Flow\\n\\n1. Gather candidate context.\\n2. Estimate token pressure.\\n3. Classify context by type and value.\\n4. Apply optimization policies.\\n5. Emit final context payload.\\n6. Record savings metrics.\\n\\n## Core Modules\\n\\n### `ContextArtifactStore`\\n\\nStores bulky artifacts separately from the prompt payload.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- file read outputs\\n- grep outputs\\n- shell logs\\n- diagnostics\\n- web content\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- persist artifacts by ID\\n- expose compact metadata\\n- expose summary payloads\\n- allow expansion when the runtime explicitly needs the full artifact again\\n\\n### `ContextGovernor`\\n\\nMain orchestration layer.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- accept raw context candidates\\n- run estimation\\n- call ranking and replacement policies\\n- produce the optimized context payload\\n- emit debug and metrics events\\n\\n### `ContextBudgetPolicy`\\n\\nDefines how much context may be sent for a turn or subagent.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- enforce hard and soft token budgets\\n- handle per-agent overrides\\n- choose which classes of context degrade first\\n\\n### `ContextRanker`\\n\\nRanks context by likely task value.\\n\\nLikely high-value inputs:\\n\\n- active task objective\\n- recent file edits\\n- current errors\\n- latest tool calls\\n- task-specific memory\\n\\nLikely lower-value inputs:\\n\\n- old search output\\n- repeated file reads\\n- long shell logs already resolved\\n- stale chat history\\n\\n### `SurrogateBuilder`\\n\\nBuilds compact replacements for bulky artifacts.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- \\\"Read `src/foo.ts` previously; key exports: X, Y, Z\\\"\\n- \\\"Search result set stored as artifact `grep_17`; 32 matches across 5 files\\\"\\n- \\\"Shell output summarized: build failed in a test file due to a missing configuration value\\\"\\n\\n### `SavingsReporter`\\n\\nMeasures optimization effect.\\n\\nMetrics:\\n\\n- projected baseline tokens\\n- actual tokens sent\\n- saved tokens\\n- savings percentage\\n- latency overhead\\n\\n## Data Model\\n\\nInitial conceptual types:\\n\\n- `ContextArtifact`\\n- `ContextCandidate`\\n- `ContextSummary`\\n- `OptimizationDecision`\\n- `BudgetResult`\\n- `SavingsReport`\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\nThe most valuable runtime hooks are:\\n\\n1. before a main agent request is sent\\n2. before a subagent request is forked\\n3. when a tool result is ingested\\n4. when older transcript regions become stale\\n\\n## MVP Architecture\\n\\nThe first version should stay simple:\\n\\n- artifact storage in local files or memory\\n- heuristic ranking, not ML ranking\\n- explicit replacement rules for known bulky artifact types\\n- one runtime integration first\\n\\n## Safety Rules\\n\\n- never drop the current task objective\\n- never drop recent write/edit intent\\n- never compact unresolved error state out of existence\\n- keep a trace of every optimization decision\\n- support debug mode to inspect before/after context\\n\\n## Benchmark Harness\\n\\nThe architecture should include a repeatable benchmark mode.\\n\\nThe benchmark should compare:\\n\\n- baseline runtime behavior\\n- optimized runtime behavior\\n\\nAcross each run, record:\\n\\n- token usage\\n- latency\\n- tool count\\n- final task outcome quality\\n\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:85:      \"tokenEstimate\": 792,\n./examples/repo-review.json:95:      \"tokenEstimate\": 378,\n./examples/repo-review.json:101:      \"id\": \"search-token\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:104:      \"content\": \"./docs/architecture.md:12:2. './types.js'\\n\\nfunction buildPrompt(\\n  task: string,\\n  contextBlocks: string[],\\n  mode: ClaudePromptMode,\\n): string {\\n  const blocks = contextBlocks.map((block, index) => {\\n    return `Context Block ${index + 1}:\\\\n${block}`\\n  })\\n\\n  const instructions =\\n    mode === 'benchmark'\\n      ? [\\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\\n        ]\\n      : [\\n          'Review the provided project context.',\\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\\n        ]\\n\\n  return [\\n    ...instructions,\\n    '',\\n    `Task:\\\\n${task}`,\\n    '',\\n    ...blocks,\\n  ].join('\\\\n')\\n}\\n\\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\\n    result?: string\\n    total_cost_usd?: number\\n    modelUsage?: Record<\\n      string,\\n      {\\n        inputTokens: number\\n        outputTokens: number\\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\\n      }\\n    >\\n    usage?: {\\n      input_tokens: number\\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\\n      output_tokens: number\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  const usage = parsed.usage\\n  if (!usage) {\\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\\n  }\\n\\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\\n\\n  return {\\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\\n    model,\\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\\n  options?: {\\n    claudeBin?: string\\n    model?: string\\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\\n  },\\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\\n    task,\\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\\n    mode,\\n  )\\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\\n\\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\\n    if (options?.model) {\\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\\n    }\\n\\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\\n      input: prompt,\\n      encoding: 'utf8',\\n    })\\n\\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\\n    }\\n\\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\\n  }\\n\\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\\n\\n  const baselineTotal =\\n    baseline.inputTokens +\\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\\n    baseline.outputTokens\\n  const optimizedTotal =\\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\\n\\n  return {\\n    baseline,\\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\\n  options?: {\\n    claudeBin?: string\\n    model?: string\\n  },\\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\\n    ...options,\\n    mode: 'review',\\n  })\\n}\\n\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:67:        \"source\": \"src/claude.ts\"\n./examples/repo-review.json:104:      \"content\": \"./docs/architecture.md:12:2. /home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:24:      "content": "# Agent Context Governor\n\nOpen-source project to reduce token usage in coding-agent workflows by shaping context before requests are sent.\n\n## Status\n\nEarly design and prototype stage.\n\n## What This Project Does\n\nAgent Context Governor is an embedded optimization layer for agent-mode runtimes.\n\nCurrent goals:\n\n- estimate next-turn context cost\n- rank context by operational value\n- replace bulky low-value artifacts with compact surrogates\n- enforce per-agent budgets\n- measure projected vs actual token usage\n\n## Documents\n\n- [Vision](./docs/vision.md)\n- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.md)\n- [Roadmap](./docs/roadmap.md)\n- [Benchmarks](./docs/benchmarks.md)\n- [Glossary](./docs/glossary.md)\n\n## Getting Started\n\n```bash\nnpm install\nnpm run check\nnpm run lint\nnpm run build\nnpm test\nnpm run bench\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpm run compare:claude\n```\n\nYou can run the CLI from the repository after build with:\n\n```bash\nnpx acg help\nnpx acg list\nnpx acg bench\nnpx acg scenario subagent-debug\nnpx acg run ./examples/sample-session.json\nnpx acg compare-claude ./examples/sample-session.json\n```\n\n## Repository Basics\n\n- [License](./LICENSE)\n- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md)\n\n## Configuration\n\nThe prototype now includes a small config layer for:\n\n- budget limits\n- replacement-enabled artifact kinds\n- replacement token costs\n- candidate priority scores\n\nThe default config lives in [config.ts](./src/config.ts).\n",

string {\n  return getDefaultScenarios()\n    .map(scenario => `- ${scenario.id}: ${scenario.title}`)\n    .join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatBenchmarkOutput(): string {\n  const results = runBenchmarks(getDefaultScenarios())\n\n  return results\n    .map(result => {\n      const lines = [\n        `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n        `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n        `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n        `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n        'Decisions:',\n        ...result.decisions.map(\n          decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n        ),\n      ]\n\n      return lines.join('\\n')\n    })\n scenario: ${id}`,\n      'Available scenarios:',\n      formatScenarioList(),\n    ].join('\\n')\n  }\n\n  const result = runScenario(scenario)\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n    `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n    `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n    `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n    'Final context:',\n    ...result.finalContext.map(line => `- ${line}`),\n    'Decisions:',\n    ...result.decisions.map(\n      decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n    ),\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatScenarioResult(result: ReturnType<typeof runScenario>): string {\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${result.scenarioTitle}`,\n    `Baseline tokens: ${result.baselineTokens}`,\n    `Optimized tokens: ${result.optimizedTokens}`,\n    `Saved tokens: ${result.savedTokens} (${formatPercent(result.savingsRatio)})`,\n    'Final context:',\n    ...result.finalContext.map(line => `- ${line}`),\n    'Decisions:',\n    ...result.decisions.map(\n      decision => `- ${decision.type} ${decision.candidateId}: ${decision.reason}`,\n    ),\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatFileScenario(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runScenario(scenario)\n  return formatScenarioResult(result)\n}\n\nfunction formatClaudeComparison(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runClaudeBenchmark(scenario)\n\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Claude baseline input tokens: ${result.baseline.inputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized input tokens: ${result.optimized.inputTokens}`,\n    `Saved input tokens: ${result.savedInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude baseline cache creation tokens: ${result.baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized cache creation tokens: ${result.optimized.cacheCreationInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache creation tokens: ${result.savedCacheCreationTokens}`,\n    `Claude baseline cache read tokens: ${result.baseline.cacheReadInputTokens}`,\n    `Claude optimized cache read tokens: ${result.optimized.cacheReadInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache read tokens: ${result.savedCacheReadTokens}`,\n    `Saved total tokens: ${result.savedTotalTokens}`,\n    `Baseline output tokens: ${result.baseline.outputTokens}`,\n    `Optimized output tokens: ${result.optimized.outputTokens}`,\n    `Baseline cost USD: ${result.baseline.totalCostUsd ?? 'unknown'}`,\n    `Optimized cost USD: ${result.optimized.totalCostUsd ?? 'unknown'}`,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction formatClaudeReviewComparison(filePath: string): string {\n  const scenario = parseScenarioFile(resolve(filePath))\n  const result = runClaudeReviewComparison(scenario)\n\n  return [\n    `Scenario: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Saved input tokens: ${result.savedInputTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache creation tokens: ${result.savedCacheCreationTokens}`,\n    `Saved cache read tokens: ${result.savedCacheReadTokens}`,\n    `Saved total tokens: ${result.savedTotalTokens}`,\n    '',\n    'Baseline review:',\n    result.baseline.rawResult || '(empty)',\n    '',\n    'Optimized review:',\n    result.optimized.rawResult || '(empty)',\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction getFlagValues(argv: string[], flag: string): string[] {\n  const values: string[] = []\n  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i++) {\n    if (argv[i] === flag) {\n      const value = argv[i + 1]\n      if (value && !value.startsWith('--')) {\n        values.push(value)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return values\n}\n\nfunction getFlagValue(argv: string[], flag: string): string | undefined {\n  return getFlagValues(argv, flag)[0]\n}\n\nfunction formatImportedScenario(argv: string[]): string {\n  const objective = getFlagValue(argv, '--objective')\n  if (!objective) {\n    throw new Error('Missing required flag: --objective')\n  }\n\n  const title = getFlagValue(argv, '--title') ?? 'Imported Scenario'\n  const outFile = getFlagValue(argv, '--out') ?? './acg-session.json'\n  const searchRoot = getFlagValue(argv, '--search-root') ?? '.'\n  const softLimitTokens = Number(getFlagValue(argv, '--soft-limit') ?? '4000')\n  const hardLimitTokens = Number(getFlagValue(argv, '--hard-limit') ?? '6000')\n  const readPaths = getFlagValues(argv, '--read')\n  const logPaths = getFlagValues(argv, '--log')\n  const searchPatterns = getFlagValues(argv, '--search')\n\n  const scenario = writeImportedScenario({\n    title,\n    objective,\n    outFile,\n    softLimitTokens,\n    hardLimitTokens,\n    readPaths,\n    logPaths,\n    searchPatterns,\n    searchRoot,\n  })\n\n  return [\n    `Wrote scenario: ${outFile}`,\n    `Title: ${scenario.title}`,\n    `Candidates: ${scenario.candidates.length}`,\n    `Budget: soft=${scenario.budget.softLimitTokens} hard=${scenario.budget.hardLimitTokens}`,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction printHelp(): string {\n  return [\n    'Agent Context Governor CLI',\n    '',\n    'Usage:',\n    '  acg help',\n    '  acg [options]',\n    '  acg review-claude <scenario.json>',\n    '',\n    'Commands:',\n    '  help       Show this help text',\n    '  list       List built-in benchmark scenarios',\n    '  demo Run a real Claude review with raw and optimized context',\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction main(argv: string[]): void {\n  const [, , command = 'help', arg] = argv\n\n  switch (command) {\n    case console.log(formatBenchmarkOutput())\n      return\n    case 'scenario':\n      if (!arg) {\n        console.log('Missing scenario id.\\n')\n        console.log(formatScenarioList())\n        return\n }\n      console.log(formatClaudeReviewComparison(arg))\n      return\n    case 'import':\n      console.log(formatImportedScenario(argv.slice(2)))\n      return\n    default:\n      console.log(`Unknown command: ${command}\\n`)\n      console.log(printHelp())\n  }\n}\n\nmain(process.argv)\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:64:      "content": "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport { runScenario } from './benchmark.js'\nimport type {\n  BenchmarkScenario,\n  ClaudeComparisonResult,\n  ClaudePromptMode,\n  ClaudeUsageResult,\n} from './types.js'\n\nfunction buildPrompt(\n  task: string,\n  contextBlocks: string[],\n  mode: ClaudePromptMode,\n): string {\n  const blocks = contextBlocks.map((block, index) => {\n    return `Context Block ${index + 1}:\\n${block}`\n  })\n\n  const instructions =\n    mode === 'benchmark'\n      ? [\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\n        ]\n      : [\n          'Review the provided project context.',\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\n        ]\n\n  return [\n    ...instructions,\n    '',\n    `Task:\\n${task}`,\n    '',\n    ...blocks,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\n    result?: string\n    total_cost_usd?: number\n    modelUsage?: Record<\n      string,\n      {\n        inputTokens: number\n        outputTokens: number\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\n      }\n    >\n    usage?: {\n      input_tokens: number\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\n      output_tokens: number\n    }\n  }\n\n  const usage = parsed.usage\n  if (!usage) {\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\n  }\n\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\n\n  return {\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\n    model,\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\n    task,\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\n    mode,\n  )\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\n\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\n    if (options?.model) {\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\n    }\n\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\n      input: prompt,\n      encoding: 'utf8',\n    })\n\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\n    }\n\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\n  }\n\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\n\n  const baselineTotal =\n    baseline.inputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    baseline.outputTokens\n  const optimizedTotal =\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\n\n  return {\n    baseline,\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\n    ...options,\n    mode: 'review',\n  })\n}\n",

[\n          'You are being used only for a token benchmark.',\n          'Do not perform extra analysis.',\n          'Read the provided task and context.',\n          'Reply with exactly: OK',\n        ]\n      : [\n          'Review the provided project context.',\n          'Focus on architecture, maintainability, and security.',\n          'Be concise and concrete.',\n          'Output 3-6 short bullet points.',\n        ]\n\n  return [\n    ...instructions,\n    '',\n    `Task:\\n${task}`,\n    '',\n    ...blocks,\n  ].join('\\n')\n}\n\nfunction parseClaudeResult(stdout: string): ClaudeUsageResult {\n  const parsed = JSON.parse(stdout) as {\n    result?: string\n    total_cost_usd?: number\n    modelUsage?: Record<\n      string,\n      {\n        inputTokens: number\n        outputTokens: number\n        cacheReadInputTokens: number\n        cacheCreationInputTokens: number\n      }\n    >\n    usage?: {\n      input_tokens: number\n      cache_creation_input_tokens?: number\n      cache_read_input_tokens?: number\n      output_tokens: number\n    }\n  }\n\n  const usage = parsed.usage\n  if (!usage) {\n    throw new Error('Claude result did not contain usage data')\n  }\n\n  const model = parsed.modelUsage ? Object.keys(parsed.modelUsage)[0] : undefined\n\n  return {\n    inputTokens: usage.input_tokens,\n    cacheCreationInputTokens: usage.cache_creation_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    cacheReadInputTokens: usage.cache_read_input_tokens ?? 0,\n    outputTokens: usage.output_tokens,\n    totalCostUsd: parsed.total_cost_usd,\n    model,\n    rawResult: parsed.result ?? '',\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeBenchmark(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n    mode?: ClaudePromptMode\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  const claudeBin = options?.claudeBin ?? 'claude'\n  const mode = options?.mode ?? 'benchmark'\n  const optimized = runScenario(scenario)\n  const task = scenario.candidates[0]?.content ?? scenario.title\n  const baselinePrompt = buildPrompt(\n    task,\n    scenario.candidates.map(candidate => candidate.content),\n    mode,\n  )\n  const optimizedPrompt = buildPrompt(task, optimized.finalContext, mode)\n\n  const runClaude = (prompt: string): ClaudeUsageResult => {\n    const args = ['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']\n    if (options?.model) {\n      args.push('--model', options.model)\n    }\n\n    const result = spawnSync(claudeBin, args, {\n      input: prompt,\n      encoding: 'utf8',\n    })\n\n    if (result.status !== 0) {\n      throw new Error(result.stderr || `Claude exited with code ${result.status}`)\n    }\n\n    return parseClaudeResult(result.stdout)\n  }\n\n  const baseline = runClaude(baselinePrompt)\n  const optimizedUsage = runClaude(optimizedPrompt)\n\n  const baselineTotal =\n    baseline.inputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    baseline.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    baseline.outputTokens\n  const optimizedTotal =\n    optimizedUsage.inputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens +\n    optimizedUsage.outputTokens\n\n  return {\n    baseline,\n    optimized: optimizedUsage,\n    savedInputTokens: baseline.inputTokens - optimizedUsage.inputTokens,\n    savedCacheCreationTokens:\n      baseline.cacheCreationInputTokens -\n      optimizedUsage.cacheCreationInputTokens,\n    savedCacheReadTokens:\n      baseline.cacheReadInputTokens - optimizedUsage.cacheReadInputTokens,\n    savedTotalTokens: baselineTotal - optimizedTotal,\n  }\n}\n\nexport function runClaudeReviewComparison(\n  scenario: BenchmarkScenario,\n  options?: {\n    claudeBin?: string\n    model?: string\n  },\n): ClaudeComparisonResult {\n  return runClaudeBenchmark(scenario, {\n    ...options,\n    mode: 'review',\n  })\n}\n",

/home/glaucojrcarvalho/Projects/Pessoal/agent-context-governor/examples/repo-review.json:94:      "content": "# Security Policy\n\n## Scope\n\nThis project is an early-stage open-source library and CLI for context optimization in coding-agent workflows.\n\nSecurity issues are taken seriously, especially in areas related to:\n\n- dependency safety\n- malicious input handling\n- unsafe file or shell interactions\n- benchmark or fixture parsing\n- future runtime integrations\n\n## Reporting\n\nIf you find a security issue, do not open a public GitHub issue first.\n\nPlease report it privately to the maintainer with:\n\n- a clear description\n- impact\n- affected versions or commit range\n- reproduction steps if possible\n\nUntil a dedicated security contact exists, use GitHub private reporting if enabled for the repository.\n\n## Current Security Posture\n\nCurrent prototype protections:\n\n- no runtime dependencies\n- no network-facing server\n- no dynamic shell execution in the library itself\n- no user-supplied code execution paths in the current CLI\n\nCurrent limitations:\n\n- the project is still early\n- the benchmark and fixture model is not yet hardened for untrusted input\n- future integrations must be reviewed carefully before claiming production readiness\n\n## Disclosure Expectations\n\n- acknowledge the report\n- validate severity and impact\n- prepare a fix\n- publish a changelog entry when a fix is released\n\n## Best-Practice Direction\n\nThe repository should continue to maintain:\n\n- minimal dependency surface\n- CI verification\n- dependency update automation\n- explicit security review for any future runtime or network integration\n",

Architecture\\n\\n## Overview\\n\\nAgent Context Governor should be a runtime library, not just a reporting package.\\n\\nIt should integrate at the point where an agent runtime is about to assemble and send model context.\\n\\n## Core Flow\\n\\n1. Gather candidate context.\\n2. Estimate token pressure.\\n3. Classify context by type and value.\\n4. Apply optimization policies.\\n5. Emit final context payload.\\n6. Record savings metrics.\\n\\n## Core Modules\\n\\n### `ContextArtifactStore`\\n\\nStores bulky artifacts separately from the prompt payload.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- file read outputs\\n- grep outputs\\n- shell logs\\n- diagnostics\\n- web content\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- persist artifacts by ID\\n- expose compact metadata\\n- expose summary payloads\\n- allow expansion when the runtime explicitly needs the full artifact again\\n\\n### `ContextGovernor`\\n\\nMain orchestration layer.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- accept raw context candidates\\n- run estimation\\n- call ranking and replacement policies\\n- produce the optimized context payload\\n- emit debug and metrics events\\n\\n### `ContextBudgetPolicy`\\n\\nDefines how much context may be sent for a turn or subagent.\\n\\nResponsibilities:\\n\\n- enforce hard and soft token budgets\\n- handle per-agent overrides\\n- choose which classes of context degrade first\\n\\n### `ContextRanker`\\n\\nRanks context by likely task value.\\n\\nLikely high-value inputs:\\n\\n- active task objective\\n- recent file edits\\n- current errors\\n- latest tool calls\\n- task-specific memory\\n\\nLikely lower-value inputs:\\n\\n- old search output\\n- repeated file reads\\n- long shell logs already resolved\\n- stale chat history\\n\\n### `SurrogateBuilder`\\n\\nBuilds compact replacements for bulky artifacts.\\n\\nExamples:\\n\\n- \\\"Read `src/foo.ts` previously; key exports: X, Y, Z\\\"\\n- \\\"Search result set stored as artifact `grep_17`; 32 matches across 5 files\\\"\\n- \\\"Shell output summarized: build failed in a test file due to a missing configuration value\\\"\\n\\n### `SavingsReporter`\\n\\nMeasures optimization effect.\\n\\nMetrics:\\n\\n- projected baseline tokens\\n- actual tokens sent\\n- saved tokens\\n- savings percentage\\n- latency overhead\\n\\n## Data Model\\n\\nInitial conceptual types:\\n\\n- `ContextArtifact`\\n- `ContextCandidate`\\n- `ContextSummary`\\n- `OptimizationDecision`\\n- `BudgetResult`\\n- `SavingsReport`\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\nThe most valuable runtime hooks are:\\n\\n1. before a main agent request is sent\\n2. before a subagent request is forked\\n3. when a tool result is ingested\\n4. when older transcript regions become stale\\n\\n## MVP Architecture\\n\\nThe first version should stay simple:\\n\\n- artifact storage in local files or memory\\n- heuristic ranking, not ML ranking\\n- explicit replacement rules for known bulky artifact types\\n- one runtime integration first\\n\\n## Safety Rules\\n\\n- never drop the current task objective\\n- never drop recent write/edit intent\\n- never compact unresolved error state out of existence\\n- keep a trace of every optimization decision\\n- support debug mode to inspect before/after context\\n\\n## Benchmark Harness\\n\\nThe architecture should include a repeatable benchmark mode.\\n\\nThe benchmark should compare:\\n\\n- baseline runtime behavior\\n- optimized runtime behavior\\n\\nAcross each run, record:\\n\\n- token usage\\n- latency\\n- tool count\\n- final task outcome quality\\n\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:85:      \"tokenEstimate\": 792,\n./examples/repo-review.json:95:      \"tokenEstimate\": 378,\n./examples/repo-review.json:101:      \"id\": \"search-token\",\n./examples/repo-review.json:104:      \"content\": \"./docs/architecture.md:12:2.
